name: Shoreline Golf Course
address: 210 E Locust St, Carter Lake, IA 51510
about: Shoreline Golf Club is an 18-hole, par 72 championship course situated along the shores of Carter Lake, just north of Omaha, NE. The venue features a traditional outdoor golf experience with a scenic lakeside setting, highlighted by the metro area's most challenging 13th hole. It also provides an indoor golf simulator seasonally from mid-December to March 1st, with reservations available up to three weeks in advance. The club offers full amenities including a driving range, golf instruction, junior golf programs, dining options, and facilities for hosting outings and banquets for up to 175 guests. Pricing is available with discounted rates for seniors and a variety of season pass options, including access to another local course via the Missouri River Pass.
why_golfers_like_it: Scenic and challenging championship golf course with a signature lakeside hole
Indoor golf simulators available during winter months for year-round practice
Flexible booking system where players are only responsible for their own spot
Variety of league programs and social events for all skill levels
Family-friendly atmosphere with junior golf programs and events

food_and_drink.notes: On-site dining available with a grill menu. Accommodations for events with seating for over 175 guests.
No mention of alcohol service on-site.

simulator_hardware.notes: Simulator technology is not specified beyond the mention of indoor golf simulators.

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The website does not specify if club rentals are available, so it is recommended to bring your own clubs for your visit.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drink?
faq.answer: The venue offers on-site dining with a grill menu, but there is no mention of a BYOB policy, so outside food and drink are likely not permitted.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes on the simulator?
faq.answer: The website does not provide specific time estimates for a full 18-hole simulation. Typical simulator rounds vary, but you should allow approximately 2-3 hours for a standard round.

faq.question: Is this venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Shoreline Golf Club offers junior golf programs and is described as a venue that welcomes families, making it a suitable environment for junior golfers.
